name: its-marketplace
description: ITS internal Claude Code marketplace — curated toolkits bundling the team's standard skills for Django, testing, frontend, DevOps and content.

plugins.name: django-toolkit
plugins.description: Django development standard — architecture & DRF patterns, security hardening, and a pre-release verification loop. Bundles django-patterns, django-security and django-verification.

plugins.name: testing-toolkit
plugins.description: Testing standards for Python services and web apps — pytest & TDD patterns, Playwright/Cypress end-to-end suites, and live web-app debugging. Bundles python-testing-patterns, e2e-testing-patterns and webapp-testing.

plugins.name: browser-toolkit
plugins.description: Browser automation for Claude — bundles the Playwright MCP server so Claude can drive a real browser: navigate, click, fill forms, capture screenshots and inspect pages.

plugins.name: frontend-toolkit
plugins.description: Frontend and UI/UX design — distinctive, production-grade interfaces plus a design-intelligence library of styles, palettes and font pairings. Bundles frontend-design and ui-ux-pro-max.

plugins.name: devops-toolkit
plugins.description: DevOps and infrastructure — Docker & Compose patterns, PostgreSQL optimization and schema design, and structured rollout planning with rollback procedures. Bundles docker-patterns, postgres-patterns and devops-rollout-plan.

plugins.name: content-toolkit
plugins.description: Content creation and skill discovery — marketing copywriting for web pages and a helper for finding and installing new skills. Bundles copywriting and find-skills.
